message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class SlamLauncher {
    -int startN
    -int drawSkip
    -bool odometryOnly
    -Pose2D ipose
    -Pose2D lidarOffset
    -SensorDataReader sreader
    -PointCloudMap *pcmap
    -SlamFrontEnd sfron t
    -MapDrawer mdrawer
    -FrameworkCustomizer fcustom
    
    +SlamLauncher() : startN(0), drawSkip(10), odometryOnly(false), pcmap(nullptr)
    +~SlamLauncher()
    
    <<methods>>
    +void setStartN(int n){startN = n}
    +void setOdometryOnly(bool p){odometryOnly = p}
    +void run()
    +void showScans()
    +void mapByOdometry(Scan2D *scan)
    +bool setFilename(char *filename)
    +void skipData(int num)
    +void customizeFramework()
}

interface SensorDataReader {}
interface PointCloudMap {}
interface SlamFrontEnd {}
interface MapDrawer {}
interface FrameworkCustomizer {}

' Relationships from attributes to interfaces using aggregation diamonds at source end
"sensor data reader attribute":s --o "SensorDataReader:n", length=45, thickness=3
"point cloud map pointer attribute":sw --o "PointCloudMap:ne", length=67, thickness=3
slfrnt:s --o "SlamFrontEnd:n", length=89, thickness=3
mdrawer:w --o "MapDrawer:e", length=111, thickness=3
fcustom:se --o "FrameworkCustomizer:nw", length=133, thickness=3


@enduml
